name: multi-aiweb-runtime
description: Local MCP runtime that lets Codex run ChatGPT/Gemini and future AI web browser sessions through explicit, user-mediated Oracle or Playwright paths with structured artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Run ChatGPT, Gemini, and future AI web browser targets as local Codex MCP tools with dry-run, live sessions, and auditable artifacts.
interface.longDescription: A local runtime plugin for Codex that exposes AI web browser targets through MCP tools: prepare session, start runs, wait, inspect status, resume blocked sessions, and read artifacts. Authentication remains user-mediated through target-specific browser profiles; the plugin does not copy cookies, extract tokens, enable provider API keys by default, or bypass CAPTCHA/payment gates.
defaultPrompt: GPT Pro web review via Oracle. Use Pro Extended only when explicitly requested.
Prepare the ChatGPT web profile and report login, Pro, or CAPTCHA blockers.
Run an AI web dry run and show artifact paths before sending files.
